cca-desc: Assures an agreement to Creative Commons licencing
cca-agreement-WikiSkripta:
I will release all my texts under the Attribution 3.0 Czech Republic
(CC-BY-3.0-CZ) licence. Details can be found at WikiSkripta:Autorské právo.
